statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); project=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.project_dir'); if [ "$cwd" = "$project" ]; then printf "[%s] %s" "$model" "$(basename "$cwd")"; else printf "[%s] %s → %s" "$model" "$(basename "$project")" "$(basename "$cwd")"; fi
